message:
I have a friend who’s the epitome of the gloriously over-prepared person. I mean, she has a go-bag for every conceivable scenario and a spreadsheet to track it all! One day, we were chatting about family readiness, and she pulled out her ‘emergency snack kit’—it had everything from granola bars to those little packets of peanut butter. 

While I laughed at her enthusiasm, it struck me how comforting it is to have a plan (and maybe a few extra snacks!) tucked away for peace of mind. It’s not about expecting the worst, but rather being ready for whatever might come our way. 

This little refresher helped me remember to check my own supplies, and I’m feeling pretty good about it! What’s one thing you’ve tucked away that makes you feel ready for anything?
